last_run.summary: Phase 1 completed: CTDE global state, offline replay schema, synthetic expert data, BC/CQL/IQL CPU-smoke interfaces, and objective reachability guard.

validation.summary: Phase 1 validation passed. CTDE tests 3 passed. Offline replay schema tests 2 passed. Offline algorithm tests 4 passed. MiniMOBA/training/algorithms regression tests 103 passed, 1 skipped. compileall passed. ruff passed after formatting fixes.

phase_history.name: MARL + Offline RL Foundation
phase_history.summary: CTDE global state is separate from actor observations; synthetic replay round-trip is deterministic; BC loss decreases; CQL/IQL smoke losses are finite; objective reachability guard blocks zero-objective claims.
